caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Increase
caribbean.paragraph: San Juan is experiencing 21 kt winds with a 74% rain probability and 4.9 ft wave heights, while St. Thomas is seeing winds of 24 kt. I expect these conditions to impact port operations in the Eastern Caribbean, particularly in San Juan and St. Thomas, with the high rain probability and moderate winds being the main concerns.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 19 kt winds with 4.3 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Cadiz has 12 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with the dominant swell direction from the north, affecting maritime activities in the Eastern and Western Mediterranean, particularly in ports like Mykonos.
